zh.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh.Mitford, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bertram I於1187年4月23日出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親William Bertram Baron of Mitford30歲，母親Alice de Umfreville27歲。他於1215年與Agnes de Emmely在英國英格蘭諾福爾可米特福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年10月7日在他的家鄉享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德。

zh-hans.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh-hans.Mitford, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Bertram I于1187年4月23日出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲William Bertram Baron of Mitford30岁，母亲Alice de Umfreville27岁。他于1215年与Agnes de Emmely在英国英格兰諾福爾可米特福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年10月7日在他的家乡享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English (mainly in southeastern Scotland, of Norman origin), French, and Danish: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bertram, composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. The raven was the bird of Odin, king of the gods, in ancient Germanic mythology. The personal name was common in France throughout the Middle Ages (especially in the form Bertrand ), where its popularity was increased by the fame of the troubadour Bertrand de Born (c. 1140–1214). The name was taken to England by the Normans in the forms Bertran(d), Bertram, and Bartram.

variants.name: Beltrami
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Dino, Marco, Pio, Sal, Tullio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Beltrame, from an ancient Germanic name composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. See also Bertram .

variants.name: Bartram
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and North German: variant of   Bertram  .

History: William Bartram, a Quaker, had a large farm near Darby, PA, when his eldest son, John, the first American botanist, was born in 1699. John conducted botanical experiments at his own farm in Kingsessing, PA, near Philadelphia.

variants.name: Bertman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Wilhelm.
Americanized form of German Bertmann: altered form (by folk etymology) of Bertram .

variants.name: Bethke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eldor, Ewald, Otto, Rudi, Wilhelmina.
North German: from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal names   Bertram   or   Berthold  . See also   Beth  .

variants.name: Bertrand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Monique, Francois, Gilles, Raoul, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Odette.

French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Bertrand, a variant of Bertram , coined by folk etymology under the influence of the present participle endings -and, -ant.
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Beltran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Jorge, Mario, Ricardo, Francisco, Rafael.
Spanish (Beltrán), Catalan, and southern French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. See also Bertram .

variants.name: Beltramo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo.
Italian: from the medieval personal name Beltramo, of ancient Germanic origin (see Bertram ).

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

variants.name: Battermann
meanings: German:
possibly an occupational name for a merchant or peddler, from Bartermann.
alternatively, perhaps from a short form of the personal name Bertram + Middle High German man ‘man’.

variants.name: Bertran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jorge, Eduardo, Enrique, Joaquin, Ricardo, Aleida, Ana, Ana Maria, Elena, Felipe, Jeronimo.  French Andre.
French, Occitan, and Catalan: variant of   Bertram   or   Bertrand  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bertram I was born on 23 April 1187, in England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bertram Baron of Mitford, was 30 and his mother, Alice de Umfreville, was 27. He married Agnes de Emmely in 1215, in Mitford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 October 1214, in his hometown, at the age of 27, and was buried in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bertram I est né le 23 avril 1187, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bertram Baron of Mitford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice de Umfreville, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes d’Emmely en 1215, à Mitford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1214, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bertram I am 23. April 1187 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bertram Baron of Mitford 30 und seine Mutter Alice de Umfreville 27. Er hat 1215 in Mitford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Emmely geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1214 im Alter von 27 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bertram I è nato il il 23 aprile 1187 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bertram Baron of Mitford, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Umfreville, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Emmely nel 1215, nel Mitford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 ottobre 1214, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペス
ja.Mitford, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Roger Bertram Iが1187年4月23日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父William Bertram Baron of Mitfordは30歳，母Alice de Umfrevilleは27歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクミトフォードでAgnes de Emmelyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年10月7日に故郷で27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bertram I(이)가 1187년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bertram Baron of Mitford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Umfreville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 미트퍼드에서 Agnes de Emmely(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 10월 7일 그의 고향에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.23 April 1187–7 October 1214: 1187 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 23–1214 оны Аравдугаар сарын 7
mn.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: Morpeth, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Mitford, Northumberland, England: Mitford, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.23 April 1187–7 October 1214: 23 de abril de 1187–7 de outubro de 1214
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bertram I nasceu em 23 de abril de 1187, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bertram Baron of Mitford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Umfreville, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Emmely em 1215, em Mitford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1214, em sua cidade natal, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bertram I родился 23 апреля 1187 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bertram Baron of Mitford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Umfreville, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Emmely в 1215 г. в местности митфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 октября 1214 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.23 April 1187–7 October 1214: 23 de abril de 1187–7 de octubre de 1214
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bertram I nació el 23 de abril de 1187, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bertram Baron of Mitford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice de Umfreville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes de Emmely en 1215, en Mitford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1214, en su pueblo, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
